text:
大・迫・力！
すっごいねー、本当にいたよ
すっごいでっかい海王種！

……本当に自然発生した生物なのかな。
すごく、いびつに見えたけど。

自然に生まれたにしては、泳ぐのに
不必要なもの満載だったよねー。
ごっちゃごちゃになってる感じ！

……思った以上にヘンな惑星ね、ここ。
こうして間近でいろいろ見ておいたのは
正解だったかも。

Get a load of THAT! The rumors were true!
There really are giant Oceanids!

Is something like that even natural, though?
Everything about it seemed so weird and
distorted...

True! Why would a sea creature have so many
parts that don't help it swim to begin with?
It was like some kid just glued bits together!

This place is stranger than I thought.
I'm glad we took the chance to come
see things for ourselves.
